name: Brevard Scraper v3 - Firecrawl Extract + Excel

jsonBody.prompt: Extract all surplus cases with sale date 02/19/2026, status ACTIVE, surplus >= $25,000, owner INDIVIDUAL (not LLC/INC/CORP). Return JSON: {"found":true,"cases":[{"Case Number":"","Parcel Number":"","Case Parties":"","Property Address":"","Surplus Remaining":""}]}
